summary: Block 242 Real-time Live Feed WebSocket feature testing completed. All 11 backend tests PASS. Frontend verified: Socket.IO connection establishes successfully (console shows [LiveHive] Connected), 'Live Feed' indicator displays in header with animated honey dot when connected, NEW_POST listener is implemented correctly, showNewPosts() function prepends posts and scrolls to top, author filtering excludes own posts from notification.

issues: Discogs album cover images return 403 (external resource limitation, not app bug)
Onboarding modal blocks Hive interaction for new users (expected behavior, not a bug)

critical_code_review_comments: live_hive.py: Socket.IO server correctly configured with cors_allowed_origins='*' and async_mode='asgi'
live_hive.py lines 23-28: emit_new_post() broadcasts NEW_POST event with {post, author_id} payload
server.py line 214: combined_app = socketio.ASGIApp wraps FastAPI with socketio_path='/api/ws/socket.io'
routes/hive.py lines 296-303: _emit_and_return() helper calls emit_new_post() and returns PostResponse
routes/hive.py: All composer endpoints (now-spinning, note, new-haul, iso, vinyl-mood, randomizer) call _emit_and_return()
SocketContext.js lines 20-26: Socket.IO client connects to /api/ws/socket.io with websocket+polling transports
SocketContext.js: Provides {socket, connected} context to entire app via SocketProvider
HivePage.js lines 530-545: NEW_POST event handler filters out own posts (author_id === user?.id)
HivePage.js lines 548-556: showNewPosts() prepends unique posts to feed and scrolls to top
HivePage.js lines 813-829: 'New Posts' button renders conditionally when newPostsQueue.length > 0 with data-testid='new-posts-btn'
HivePage.js lines 729-734: Live Feed indicator shows 'Live Feed' text + animated honey dot when connected, 'Feed' when disconnected
App.js: SocketProvider wraps app inside AuthProvider to ensure token is available for WebSocket connection
seed_data_creation: Test created and cleaned up posts during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 242 WebSocket Live Feed fully verified. Backend Socket.IO server runs at /api/ws/socket.io and returns valid handshake with sid. All composer endpoints (now-spinning, note, new-haul, iso) emit NEW_POST events via _emit_and_return(). Frontend connects via SocketContext.js and HivePage listens for NEW_POST events, filtering out own posts, queuing others, and showing 'N new posts' button that prepends posts on click. The 'Live Feed' text + animated dot indicator shows WebSocket connected status. Cross-user notification requires two simultaneous browser sessions to fully test manually.

live_feed_indicator.details: 'Live Feed' text + animated honey dot shown when WebSocket connected

websocket_connection.details: Console shows [LiveHive] Connected: <sid> on page load

own_post_filtering.details: handleNewPost filters out posts where author_id === user?.id

post_response_structure.details: Post responses include id, user_id, post_type, created_at, user object

mocked_api_note: No APIs mocked for this test
